author: Monique Volz of AmbitiousKitchen.com
title: Spicy Roasted Red Pepper Feta Dip
ingredients: 1 cup (6 ounces) drained roasted red bell peppers
1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice (or red wine vinegar!)
1 teaspoon red pepper flakes (or sub a jalapeno or a spicy red pepper!)
instructions_list: In the bowl of a food processor, add in the feta, drained roasted red bell peppers, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, and red pepper flakes.
Process on high until the dip comes together, about 1 minute, scraping down the sides of the bowl as necessary.
Serve with pita chips, crackers, veggies or use as a spread on sandwiches or wraps.
description: Creamy, spicy roasted red pepper feta dip made with six simple ingredients easily blended right in your food processor. This savory red pepper dip not only makes a delicious appetizer or snack with pita chips, veggies, and crackers, but is also the perfect spread on sandwiches or wraps! Add a kick of heat to your charcuterie board or lunch with this wonderful dip.
